post_emit_notes: Deploy via the config-management phenotype — onboard each role (api, frontend, workers) as a service with its flag profile; do NOT hand-roll IaC here.
Make the model gateway pluggable to your provider; reference provider keys by name (secrets manager), never embed them.
Implement the surfaces the reference left partial: rollback wiring, descendant propagation, async/usage endpoints, real eval + observability — do not ship them as stubs.
Run migrations for agent_templates + template_versions; resolved_config is materialized on write.
Frontend: VITE_* baked at build from the service registry; token_storage default 'memory' (the reference used localStorage).
Pair with the user-management phenotype if you want built-in identity instead of an external auth service.
